name: Wild Rice Grain Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl: 1/4 cup of brown rice, 1/4 cup of wild rice, 1/4 cup of long-grain brown rice, 1/4 cup of short-grain rice, and 1/4 cup of white rice.
2. Add an additional 1/2 cup of brown rice to the mixture.
3. Finally, add 1 tablespoon of wild rice.
4. Mix together all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Store the mixed grain in a covered container in your pantry.
6. This mix can be kept indefinitely when stored properly and used as you would use brown rice.
